one_time_description: Extraordinary item listed in expenses by object
economic_notes: First Nation holds 11.1% interest in MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership. 100% ownership of Makwa Lake Development Co. (GBE). Member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (9 nations). Operates Makwa Store (retail/gas/grocery). Holds shares in First Nations Bank and Meadow Lake Co-operative Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Audit report signed March 31, 2021 — over one year delay. Consolidated entities include Operations, CMHC Housing Fund, and Store Enterprise. Makwa Lake Development Co. accounted for under modified equity method (GBE). MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership accounted for under modified equity method. Comparative 2019 figures restated (see note 28 — not included in extracted text). Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness $0 + accounts payable $1,662,544 + unexpended revenue $3,737,866 = $5,400,410. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $13,637,623 + Revenue Trust $27,170 + Health Canada $17,948 + MLTC $5,430,985 + Govt of Saskatchewan $26,500 + Saskatchewan Lotteries $10,958 + CMHC $885,676 + Northern Lights $127,859 + First Nations Trust $514046 + Sales tax refunds $49,291 = $20,728,056; however including unexpended revenue adjustment net effect excluded from OSR calc — OSR estimated from store sales + rent + other + limited partnership + GBE earnings + interest. Extraordinary item of $163,841 noted in expenses by object with no description. No remuneration schedule found in provided text.
